"Do you want flowers? Shapes? Animals?" Animals, I said. "You have a cat and a dog right? Do you want cats and dogs?" Yes grandma.
"What about horses? Or camels?" "Camels would be good." "What about horses?" "No horses please."
"If you have camels do you want some background things? Camel things?"
"How about some pyramids, some palm trees, and a little oasis." "I can't do an oasis." "Oh." "Wait, hold on, maybe I can."
"Do cactus grow there? Should I put cactus on it?" "Hm cacti would probably grow further away from the oasis since they store water so well"
"OK so we have camels, pyramids, oasis, palm tree, no cactus, and probably sand, right? Do you want a big sun?" "Use your best judgment"
